description: Anima txt2img aesthetic LoRA workflow with optional Anima Artist Mixer cross-attention artist-chain support. Use only when the user explicitly requests multi-artist/artist-chain mixing.

prompt_11.description: Main positive prompt without repeating artist names when artist_chain is used.

fls_fovea_strength.description: Optional FLSampler texture strength. Default 3.0 follows the author default/recommended starting value; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler texture/detail.

fls_sharpness.description: Optional FLSampler local contrast/sharpness. Default 0.5 follows the author default; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler sharpness.

fls_mask_inertia.description: Optional FLSampler focus mask inertia. Default 0.85 follows the author default; only pass when the user explicitly asks to tune FLSampler focus stability.

rtx_vsr_quality.description: RTX VSR quality: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, ULTRA. Scale is fixed to 2x in workflow JSON.

teacache_threshold.description: TeaCache threshold. Default 0.15 is the conservative Anima setting; lower values are safer.

teacache_adaptive_mode.description: Enable TeaCache adaptive mode. Default true.

teacache_cache_device.description: TeaCache cache device: cuda or cpu. Default cuda.

teacache_version.description: AnimaTeaCache version enum: v1 (Legacy Fast) or v2 (Standard Precise). Default is v1 (Legacy Fast); do not pass short values v1/v2.

anima_booster_sage_attention.description: Optional AnimaBoosterLoader SageAttention mode: disabled, auto, triton, sageattn_qk_int8_pv_fp16_cuda, sageattn_qk_int8_pv_fp8_cuda. Default disabled; only pass when user explicitly requests node-level control.

anima_booster_torch_compile.description: Optional AnimaBoosterLoader torch.compile toggle. Default false; only pass when user explicitly requests compile/JIT warmup behavior.

artist_chain.description: Optional artist chain for Anima Artist Mixer. Comma or newline separated artist names; do not include @. Supports explicit weights such as (wlop:1.2) and v24 injection weights such as ::wlop::1.2. Use only when user explicitly requests artist-chain mixing.

artist_mixer_combine_mode.description: Artist mixer combine mode: output_avg or concat. Default output_avg.

artist_mixer_fusion_mode.description: Artist mixer fusion mode: interpolate or concat_with_base. Default interpolate.

artist_mixer_strength.description: Overall artist-chain contribution. Official recommended default is 1.0; use the workflow default unless the user explicitly asks to tune Artist Mixer strength.

artist_mixer_enabled.description: Master toggle for Anima Artist Mixer. Default true in this dedicated workflow.

artist_mixer_apply_to_uncond.description: Apply artist mixer to uncond rows. Default false and not recommended because it can break CFG behavior.

artist_mixer_start_block.description: Advanced artist mixer start block. Default 0.

artist_mixer_end_block.description: Advanced artist mixer end block. Default -1 means last block.

artist_mixer_start_percent.description: Advanced artist mixer sampling start percent. Default 0.0.

artist_mixer_end_percent.description: Advanced artist mixer sampling end percent. Default 1.0.

artist_mixer_normalize_weights.description: Normalize artist-chain weights. Default true; turning off with many artists can destabilize output.

artist_mixer_layer_filter.description: Advanced explicit layer selection, e.g. 0,3,5-10,-1. Overrides start/end block when set.
